dct_title_s: Democratic Republic of the Congo GRID3 COD - Walking Travel Time Friction Surface v1.0, 2026
dct_description_sm: Democratic Republic of the Congo GRID3 COD - Walking Travel Time Friction Surface v1.0, 2026 is a raster dataset representing a travel time cost surface for walking in the Democratic Republic of the Congo. Complete documentation and codebook can be found in the full download package. Also available from Columbia Academic Commons at https://doi.org/10.7916/11yp-gs23
dct_creator_sm: Center for International Earth Science Information Network
dct_publisher_sm: Center for International Earth Science Information Network
dct_rightsHolder_sm: Center for International Earth Science Information Network
